title: Wave of layoffs at Xbox affects Zenimax Online Studios and threatens id Tech engine
summary: Massive cuts impact The Elder Scrolls Online team and raise doubts about the future of id Software's graphics engine.

title: Marathon's experimental PvE mode will only be available for two weeks in July
summary: Bungie launches a temporary roguelite mode that will expand in autumn, generating excitement among players.

title: New Marvel's Wolverine trailer shows Lady Deathstrike and Sabretooth
summary: Sony releases spectacular trailer for Insomniac's game, while players express dissatisfaction over the lack of physical format.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced continues to generate controversy despite its millionaire extra earnings
summary: Ubisoft adds a New Game Plus mode and fixes bugs, while ignoring complaints about paid DLC.

title: KOTOR, The Witcher and Thief remakes set the current industry trend
summary: While Nintendo questions the excess of remakes, studios confirm new versions of classics with hopeful release windows.

title: Artificial intelligence continues to divide the video game industry
summary: From Netflix to Roblox, to George Lucas and Linus Torvalds, AI is a hot topic in development and creativity.

title: EA sees a 'great opportunity' in in-game advertising if done correctly
summary: The company urges integrating ads from the development stage, sparking debate among players.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 bets on immersion and classic vehicles
summary: Infinity Ward shows off the new Kill Block and defends development against competition from GTA 6.

title: Mortal Shell 2 physical edition sells out and players clamor for more
summary: The summer's soulslike sees its physical version sold out, fueling the debate on digital distribution.

title: Hasbro and Nintendo partner to launch The Legend of Zelda toys
summary: The collaboration will bring the first product soon, while Nintendo accelerates promotion of the Zelda movie.

title: Former Rockstar developers explain the decision to release GTA 6 first on consoles
summary: Lack of time and resources justifies the game not coming to PC at launch, according to former employees.

title: Final Fantasy Resonance dazzles with new 'Pixel' trailer before its Switch launch
summary: Square Enix shows impressive visuals of the game, which will arrive on Nintendo Switch and Switch 2.

title: Palworld breaks records on Steam as players search for resources and items
summary: The 'Pokémon with guns' game becomes the most played on the platform, and location guides become popular.

title: James Bond franchise stays alive with new video game projects
summary: GoldenEye 007 gets a worthy replacement, while details of the canceled 007 First Light are revealed.

title: GTA 6 hacker provokes from prison and prepares for new trial
summary: The young man who leaked key game information leaves the hospital and awaits the repeat of his legal process.

title: User creates physical cartridges for Steam games using affordable SSDs
summary: An ingenious system allows having a tangible collection of digital games, similar to classic cartridges.

title: Nolan's Odyssey rakes in critical praise as a series about Odysseus is prepared
summary: The film scores 96% on Rotten Tomatoes, and Halo's director joins the television project about Odysseus.

title: GOG strengthens its preservation program with Thief Gold and defends player rights
summary: The platform updates a classic with improved graphics and criticizes Sony for restrictions on purchased games.

title: Fortnite adds new locations, skins, and the collaboration with Matt Damon
summary: Chapter 7 Season 3 adds the Batcave, Batman's Buggy, and the arrival of actor Matt Damon to the game.

title: GTA 6 receives record sales predictions and debate over its price
summary: Experts estimate that the game could be the last great blockbuster and suggest a price above 100 euros.
